languages.text: "Если я так тебе не нравлюсь, почему решил мне помочь?"
"If you dislike me so much, why did you bother helping me?"
languages.original_text: "Если я так тебе не нравлюсь, почему решил мне помочь?"

traits.locale_text: "If you dislike me so much, why did you bother helping me?"
"If you dislike me so much, why did you bother helping me?"
"Colonel, let us drop the pretence. You dislike me. Why?"
"If you dislike me so much, why did you bother helping me?"
"If you dislike me so much, why did you bother helping me?"
"If you dislike me so much, why did you bother helping me?"

languages.text: 「大佐、もう取り繕うのはやめましょう。あなたは私のことがお嫌いですね。なぜ？」
languages.original_text: "Colonel, let us drop the pretence. You dislike me. Why?"

traits.locale_text: 大佐、もう取り繕うのはやめましょう。あなたは私のことがお嫌いですね。なぜですか？

languages.text: « Si je vous déplais tant que ça, pourquoi prendre la peine de m'aider ? »
languages.original_text: "If you dislike me so much, why did you bother helping me?"

traits.locale_text: « Si je vous déplais tant que ça, pourquoi prendre la peine de m'aider ? »

languages.text: "Benden bu kadar hoşlanmıyorsan bana yardım etme zahmetine neden girdin?"
languages.original_text: "If you dislike me so much, why did you bother helping me?"

traits.locale_text: "Benden bu kadar hoşlanmıyorsan bana yardım etme zahmetine neden girdin?"

languages.text: «Si tanto le disgusto, ¿por qué se ha molestado en ayudarme?».
languages.original_text: "If you dislike me so much, why did you bother helping me?"

traits.locale_text: «Si tanto le disgusto, ¿por qué se ha molestado en ayudarme?».

languages.text: “既然你这么讨厌我，又何必费心帮我？”
languages.original_text: "If you dislike me so much, why did you bother helping me?"

traits.locale_text: “既然你这么讨厌我，又何必费心帮我？”

languages.text: "Wenn ich Euch derart zuwider bin, warum helft Ihr mir dann?"
languages.original_text: "If you dislike me so much, why did you bother helping me?"

traits.locale_text: "Wenn ich Euch derart zuwider bin, warum helft Ihr mir dann?"
